name: Guangdong New Grand Long Packing Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong New Grand Long Packing Co., Ltd. engages in the research, design, manufacture, marketing, and service of cigarette packing products for various brands primarily in China. The company was formerly known as Chaozhou New Grand Long Packing Co., Ltd and changed its name to Guangdong New Grand Long Packing Co., Ltd. in 2010. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Chaozhou, China. Guangdong New Grand Long Packing Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Yize Holding Group Limited.
